title: Matejcek Double Homicide Investigation - Records Request (Bradenton, 2023)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

I respectfully request copies of the following records related to the homicide investigation and arrest of Thomas Matejcek for the deaths of Patricia "Patty" Matejcek and Sean Harrison, which occurred in Bradenton, Manatee County, Florida, in 2023:

1. All body-worn camera video from MCSO deputies who responded to the initial scene, welfare check, and/or the arrest of Thomas Matejcek
2. All 911 audio recordings and CAD (Computer-Aided Dispatch) records for the incident
3. The full initial incident/offense report and any supplemental reports
4. The arrest report and probable cause affidavit
5. Any recorded custodial interview or interrogation of Thomas Matejcek
6. Crime scene photographs, diagrams, and evidence logs
7. Any press releases or public statements issued by MCSO regarding the case

Please provide records in electronic format where possible to minimize cost. I am willing to pay reasonable duplication fees up to $100 without prior approval; please notify me if fees will exceed this amount before producing records.

This case has been fully adjudicated (guilty verdict April 6, 2026), so exemptions under F.S. 119.071(2)(c) for active criminal investigations should no longer apply.

Thank you for your time.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Ka Yi Lo
